import subprocess
import sys

# Uninstall and reinstall typing_extensions
subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "uninstall", "-y", "typing_extensions"])
subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "--no-cache-dir", "typing_extensions>=4.8.0"])
subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "--no-cache-dir", "ast2json"])

print("✅ Dependencies installed")
print("⚠️  IMPORTANT: STOP THIS SESSION AND START A NEW ONE before continuing!")

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
import os

# Enable anonymisation
os.environ["ODW_ENABLE_ANONYMISATION"] = "true"
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

# # Test data
# test_data = [
#     {"id": "1", "full_name": "John Doe", "email": "john.doe@example.com"},
#     {"id": "2", "full_name": "Jane Smith", "email": "jane.smith@example.com"}
# ]
# df = spark.createDataFrame(test_data)


if source_folder == "ServiceBus":
    table_name: str = f"odw_standardised_db.sb_{entity_name.replace('-', '_')}"
else:
    table_name: str = f"odw_standardised_db.{entity_name.replace('-', '_')}"
df = spark.table(table_name)

# Test AnonymisationEngine directly
print("=== Testing AnonymisationEngine ===")
# cols = [
#     {"column_name": "full_name", "classifications": ["MICROSOFT.PERSONAL.NAME"]},
#     {"column_name": "email", "classifications": ["MICROSOFT.PERSONAL.EMAIL"]}
# ]

# Primary extraction attempt
cols = _extract_classified_columns(entity_name, purview_name=purview_name, headers=headers, api_version=api_version)


engine = AnonymisationEngine()
result = engine.apply(df, cols)

print("\nOriginal data:")
df.show(truncate=False)

print("\nAnonymised data:")
result.show(truncate=False)

# Test ServiceBusStandardisationProcess
print("\n=== Testing ServiceBusStandardisationProcess ===")
process = ServiceBusStandardisationProcess(spark, debug=True)
print(f"Anonymisation enabled: {process.enable_anonymisation}")
print(f"Anonymisation engine initialized: {process.anonymisation_engine is not None}")
